name: IonQ, Inc.
business: IonQ sells specialized quantum computing hardware, quantum networking, quantum sensing, and quantum security products, along with maintenance and support. It also provides quantum-computing-as-a-service (QCaaS) via cloud platforms and offers satellite-based data-as-a-service, including synthetic-aperture radar imaging. The company sells full quantum computing systems to customers and provides professional services for algorithm development.
namedCustomers: United States Air Force Research Lab
Centre for Commercialization of Regenerative Medicine

exposures.sentence: Today, we sell specialized quantum computing hardware, together with complementary products and services, such as quantum networking, quantum sensing and quantum security products and associated maintenance and support.

Today, we sell specialized quantum computing hardware, together with complementary products and services, such as quantum networking, quantum sensing and quantum security products and associated maintenance and support.

Additionally, through a network of satellites, we offer data-as-a-service products to customers, including synthetic-aperture radar imaging, and through combining our satellite platform with our quantum sensing products, we intend to offer advanced quantum positioning, navigation and timing services in the future.

Our customers, potential customers and partners include government agencies such as the United States Air Force Research Lab, Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency and Oak Ridge National Laboratory.

On January 26, 2026, we announced the currently-pending acquisition, which we refer to as the SkyWater Acquisition, of SkyWater Technologies, Inc., which we refer to as SkyWater, and which we believe will accelerate our roadmap by providing us with embedded access to a secure quantum foundry.

IonQ has announced co-development agreements with Ansys for computer aided design and engineering, the Centre for Commercialization of Regenerative Medicine, for advanced therapeutics optimization, and with the US Defense Advanced Research Projects Agency to help establish the next generation of benchmarking for quantum computers.

Quantum computing is likely to offer new machine-learning modalities, greatly improving existing classical machine learning when used in tandem with it.
One application of the quantum Monte Carlo algorithm is to price options for the financial industry.
Optimization problems have enormous economic significance in many industries, and they often cannot be solved with classical computers due to their daunting complexity.
An example of such a simulation problem is modeling the core molecule in the nitrogen fixation process to make fertilizer.

Similarly, we believe that developing a detailed understanding of chemical reactions critical to various industries, such as catalytic reaction in battery chemistry for electric vehicles, can lead to higher performing solutions with extended energy storage capacity.

catalysts.sentence: In September 2025, we acquired Oxford Ionics Limited, which we believe will accelerate our quantum computing roadmap by using Electronic Qubit Control (EQC) to leverage semiconductor production and scaling.

Similarly, in May 2025, we acquired Lightsynq Technologies, Inc., which provided us access to a world-class R&D team and photonic interconnect technology, which we believe will enable higher-performance quantum networking solutions.

catalysts.event: Announcement of pending acquisition of SkyWater Technologies, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On January 26, 2026, we announced the currently-pending acquisition, which we refer to as the SkyWater Acquisition, of SkyWater Technologies, Inc., which we refer to as SkyWater, and which we believe will accelerate our roadmap by providing us with embedded access to a secure quantum foundry.

catalysts.event: Achievement of two-qubit gate fidelity of 99.99%
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, we announced that we were the first and, to date, only quantum computing company to achieve two-qubit gate fidelity of 99.99%.

catalysts.event: Entered into definitive agreement to acquire SkyWater Technologies, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: On January 25, 2026, we entered into a definitive agreement to acquire SkyWater for total consideration of approximately $1.8 billion in a cash-and-stock transaction.

tamClaims.claim: Over $50 billion in total government and private investment in quantum technology
tamClaims.sentence: In a 2025 update of the previously referenced publicly available report, the third-party consulting firm detailed over $50 billion in total government and private investment in quantum technology and estimated up to $2 trillion in economic value from quantum computing in the next ten years.
